archetypes.name: worker evidence replay
archetypes.trigger: worker signal changes while lives context is stale
archetypes.expected: block release until cited evidence is regenerated

archetypes.name: lives boundary probe
archetypes.trigger: lives handoff crosses a policy or trust boundary
archetypes.expected: route to reviewer with evidence packet

archetypes.name: isolation regression harness
archetypes.trigger: isolation behavior regresses against the last accepted fixture
archetypes.expected: open a regression issue with trace and benchmark delta

archetypes.name: observability operator packet
archetypes.trigger: observability output needs a human-readable audit packet
archetypes.expected: accept only if decision claims cite fixture evidence
